EMA Partners India Limited has informed the Exchange about further to our intimation dated July 02, 2026 disclosing payment of acquisition consideration in terms of the Share Purchase and Subscription Agreement ( SPSA ) executed for the acquisition of 100% equity shares of M/s Talent Hired The Job Store Private Limited ( Taggd ), including subscription of equity shares under Private Placement via preferential basis. We would like to inform you that EMA Partners India Limited ( EMA Partners ) has been allotted today i.e. July 06, 2026, 66,691 Equity Shares of face value ₹ 1 (Rupee One) each, issued by Taggd to the Company at a price of ₹ 1,141 per share (including premium of ₹ 1,140 per share), aggregating Rs. 7,60,94,431/- (Rupees Seven Crores Sixty Lakhs Ninety-Four Thousand Four Hundred and Thirty-One only) on a preferential basis, in terms of the SPSA. |SUBJECT: General Updates
